scripts.e2e:from-boot: npm run e2e:docker-up && npm run e2e:cold
scripts.e2e:test12:once: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE BROWSERSLIST_IGNORE_OLD_DATA=1 cypress run --config-file cypress.config.cjs --spec "cypress/e2e/new/new-2/012_presseGeneraleCreateOption2.cy.js"
scripts.e2e:cypress-new-only: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE BROWSERSLIST_IGNORE_OLD_DATA=1 cypress run --config-file cypress.config.cjs --spec "cypress/e2e/new/**/*.cy.js"
scripts.e2e:dev:smoke: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE BROWSERSLIST_IGNORE_OLD_DATA=1 CYPRESS_SKIP_E2E_INFRA_GATE=1 CYPRESS_SKIP_E2E_READY_CHECKS=1 cypress run --config-file cypress.config.cjs --spec "cypress/e2e/new/new-0-start/002_servicesStatusExtended.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-0-start/003_servicesStartAll.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-0-start/004_servicesInventory.cy.js"
scripts.e2e:dev:critical: npm run e2e:guard:contracts && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE BROWSERSLIST_IGNORE_OLD_DATA=1 CYPRESS_SKIP_E2E_INFRA_GATE=1 CYPRESS_SKIP_E2E_READY_CHECKS=1 cypress run --config-file cypress.config.cjs --spec "cypress/e2e/new/new-9/030_profilePageImagesAvatars.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-9/031_sessionInvalidationReload.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-9/032_usersAdmin2026User2026.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/033_presseGeneralePhotoKeepsShell.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/034_presseGeneraleConsultAfterCreateOption1.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/035_presseGeneraleConsultAfterCreateOption2.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/036_presseGeneraleConsultAfterCreateOption3.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/037_presseGeneraleConsultAfterCreateOption4.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/038_presseLocaleConsultAfterCreateOption1.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/039_presseLocaleConsultAfterCreateOption2.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/040_presseLocaleConsultAfterCreateOption3.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-10/041_presseLocaleConsultAfterCreateOption4.cy.js,cypress/e2e/new/new-11/042_homePageRendersAdminConfig.cy.js"
scripts.e2e:cold: npm --prefix .. run e2e:compose -- down && npm --prefix .. run e2e:compose -- up -d && npm run e2e:guard:contracts && npm run e2e:ensure-build && npm run e2e:precheck && npm run e2e:cypress-new-only
scripts.cypress:run:new: npm run e2e:ensure-build && npm run e2e:cypress-new-only
scripts.premerge:check: npm run build && npm run cypress:run -- --spec cypress/e2e/new/new-9/030_profilePageImagesAvatars.cy.js --config baseUrl=http://localhost:3000
scripts.premerge:check:strict: npm run build && npm run cypress:run -- --spec cypress/e2e/new/new-9/030_profilePageImagesAvatars.cy.js --config baseUrl=http://localhost:3000 && npm run cypress:run -- --spec cypress/e2e/new/new-9/030_profilePageImagesAvatars.cy.js --config baseUrl=http://localhost:8082
scripts.premerge:check:with-refresh: npm run browserslist:update:soft && npm run premerge:check:strict
scripts.truncate:presse-locale: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@62.171.186.233 'cd /opt/presseLocale-backend && docker compose exec -T presseLocale-backend node scripts/truncate-presse-locale.js'
